prompt: A dramatic anime-style fantasy battle illustration of Artoria Pendragon, a young female knight with emerald green eyes and blonde hair styled in a braided bun with loose bangs and a single ahoge, shown in a powerful low-angle medium full-body shot. She stands in the center of the frame gripping a large glowing golden sword with both hands, the blade angled upward along the left side of the image, with ornate blue inlays and faint runic engraving. She wears blue and silver royal armor: a dark cobalt blue dress with gold trim, polished steel breastplate and faulds, heavy armored gauntlets, and layered plate armor over the torso and hips, with parts of the white underskirt torn and dirty from combat. Her expression is stern, focused, and determined, looking directly forward as if facing an enemy. The background is a burning nighttime battlefield under a deep navy sky with heavy clouds and faint stars, filled with embers, flames, ruined structures, broken spears, scattered swords, and wreckage. Include 2 visible flags in the background with blue fabric and gold heraldic emblems, partially tattered and waving in the smoke. Add subtle blood stains and battle damage on the lower armor, sparks drifting through the air, strong cinematic rim lighting from fires behind her, reflective highlights on the metal, and high-contrast heroic composition. Ultra-detailed polished anime illustration, Fate-inspired knight king aesthetic, intense atmosphere, sharp linework, rich blue-and-gold palette, vertical composition, SFW.
